The '''Seltiss-2 caravel''' was a pleasure ship manufactured by [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian Industries]] and commonly used by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. Because of this, it was often referred to as the '''Hutt caravel''' or '''Hutt chariot'''.

==Characteristics==
[[File:HuttCaravel_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Seltiss-2 [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]]]]
Costing upwards of 400,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], the inside of the Seltiss-2 was covered with [[Greel wood/Legends|greel wood]] and [[chall-crystal]]. The ship had no [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] as it was only used for journeys between [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] and [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], though it featured ample [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight drive]] capacity.

Many caravels carried concealed weapons to lull potential enemies into a false state of security. The armored front of the ship could be opened up to reveal a view of space, while if there was an emergency, the whole cabin could be ejected. The caravel also contained a kitchen and four small servant cabins, which could not be ejected.

==History==
The Seltiss-2 was preceded by the [[Seltiss-1 caravel]] in operation during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Appearances==

*[[Dark Empire 4|''Dark Empire'' 4]] {{1st}}
